1. What Is A
Hook?
Module 1 - Lesson 4
Developing Your 6FFF Hook & Promise:

-- 1 of 10 --

A 	Hook 	Is The Element Of Your
Marketing Message That Peeks
Your Prospects Attention & Gives
Them A Reason To Continue
Consuming Your Message!
Module 1 - Lesson 4
Developing Your 6FFF Hook & Promise:

-- 2 of 10 --

Elements of a Hook:!
• Is Attention-Grabbing!
• Is Relevant!
• Instantly Communicates a Benefit!
• Conveys Newness, Freshness!
• Built On A Unique Idea!
• Prevents Mental Opt-Out
Module 1 - Lesson 4
Developing Your 6FFF Hook & Promise:

-- 3 of 10 --

Examples Of Hooks:!
• “If you’re over the age of 54 and behind in
saving for retirement, there’s a new
investment vehicle that guarantees to double
your net worth in 6 years.”!
• “For online marketers with small advertising
budgets, there’s now a new way to get all the
paid traffic you want for free.”
Module 1 - Lesson 4
Developing Your 6FFF Hook & Promise:

-- 4 of 10 --

Constructing Your Hook:!
• Did you know? / If You? / Are You?!
• Specificity of issue/circumstance/situation!
• Revelation of new idea/concept (to prospects)
Module 1 - Lesson 4
Developing Your 6FFF Hook & Promise:

-- 5 of 10 --

2. What Is A
Promise?
Module 1 - Lesson 4
Developing Your 6FFF Hook & Premise:

-- 6 of 10 --

A 	Promise 	Is The Element Of Your
Marketing Message That Tells
Prospects The Big Benefit They
Stand To Gain By Consuming Your
Marketing Message!
Module 1 - Lesson 4
Developing Your 6FFF Hook & Promise:

-- 7 of 10 --

Elements Of A Powerful Promise:!
• Presents a Specific Outcome/Result!
• Conveys the Mechanism is Different/Unique!
• Resolves an urgent problem!
• Fulfills a deep desire
Module 1 - Lesson 4
Developing Your 6FFF Hook & Promise:

-- 8 of 10 --

Examples Of Promises:!
• “Simply send these 5 emails and watch as
50% or more of your inactive patients call
your office to schedule an appointment.”!
• “Use this little email sequence two times a
month and you never have to worry again
about patients leaving your office.”
Module 1 - Lesson 4
Developing Your 6FFF Hook & Promise:

-- 9 of 10 --

Constructing Your 	Promise:!
• What is the outcome (results) your product
will give to prospects?!
• What will your prospects life be like after
investing in your product/service?!
• What is the unique mechanism of your
product/service that fulfills the promise?
Module 1 - Lesson 4
Developing Your 6FFF Hook & Promise:

-- 10 of 10 --
